title: salvia apiana
intro: Salvia apiana, also known as white sage or sacred sage, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine and spiritual practices due to its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as indigestion, sore throats, and skin irritations, and is also believed to have cognitive-boosting and anti-anxiety effects. Salvia apiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function.
